name: Sir Hoodington
description: Sir Hoodington is made using a Hooded Mystery head, Buckles and Belts chest, Shell Arms, Deep Sea Legs, Double Guard for shoulder guards, Spike Bracelets for arm guards, Old Faithful Leg Armor and a Laserblade as his weapon.
biography: Sir Hoodington is a notable Imaginator created by Toys For Bob. He serves as a mascot for Skylanders: Imaginators. He is a Knight of the Fire element and is seen in many commercials, screenshots and other promos.
personality: Sir Hoodington is one of the most prominent Imaginators who has proved himself invaluable in the fight against Kaos and his Doomlanders.

story.content: Sir Hoodington is a notable Imaginator created by Toys For Bob who serves as a mascot for Skylanders: Imaginators. As a Knight of the Fire element, he is seen in many commercials, screenshots, and other promos. He is composed of specific parts: a Hooded Mystery head, Buckles and Belts chest, Shell Arms, Deep Sea Legs, Double Guard for shoulder guards, Spike Bracelets for arm guards, Old Faithful Leg Armor, and a Laserblade weapon. He is identified as one of the most prominent Imaginators and has proved himself invaluable in the fight against Kaos and his Doomlanders.

trivia: An indirect reference to Sir Hoodington's 'mascot' role is made in the book A Portal Master's Guide to Skylands, where he is identified as 'one of the most prominent Imaginators'.
Additionally, he is stated to have proved himself invaluable in the fight against Kaos and his Doomlanders.

trailers.name: Official Skylanders Imaginators Create Your Own Fire Skylander

gameplay: Sir Hoodington is a Knight of the Fire element who uses a Laserblade as his weapon. He was featured as the main example character for the Fire Knight class during the promotion of Skylanders: Imaginators.

basic.name: Laserblade
basic.content: Sir Hoodington wields a Laserblade as his primary weapon, striking down enemies with fiery precision.
